entry.title: New: Bill 88 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR TO ENTER INTO AN INTERGOVERNMENTAL AGREEMENT WITH THE STATE OF HAWAII FOR USE OF HALE ʻO LĀʻIE FOR TEMPORARY HOUSING FOR SURVIVORS OF THE 2023 MAUI WILDFIRE DISASTER THROUGH THE HAWAII INTERIM HOUSING PROGRAM"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
